title: Lifetime parameters do not match trait definition
explanation: This error occurs when the lifetime parameters in your trait implementation do not match those declared in the trait definition. The number and position of lifetime parameters must be identical.
error_message: error[E0195]: lifetime parameters or bounds on method `parse` do not match the trait declaration

fixes.description: Match the trait's lifetime parameters exactly

tip: When implementing a trait, your method signatures must exactly match the trait definition, including all lifetime parameters and bounds.
